TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Prokopis Pavlopoulos == ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 7, Prokopis Pavlopoulos, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1950) mrhuw Greece ta' misuw hya' ga Prokopis Pavlopoulos, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mintzyuwaw nya Prokopis Pavlopoulos sa kawas 1996, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. qnxan nya Vlassia Peltsemi ga, kneril ni Prokopis Pavlopoulos. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == prokopis~…ē pa*lopoulos~…ē == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, prokopis~…ē pa*lopoulos~…ē, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw …£ree ¶~ ®e ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a prokopis~…ē pa*lopoulos~…ē, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. mintzjuwaw nja prokopis~…ē pa*lopoulos~…ē s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, t ĒariŇč mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~…ēezi. qnxan nja *las~…ēs~…ēia pelts~…ēemi …£a, kneril ni prokopis~…ē pa*lopoulos~…ē. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: == Prokopis Pavlopoulos == ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 7, Prokopis Pavlopoulos, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1950) mrhuw Greece ta' misuw hya' ga Prokopis Pavlopoulos, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mintzyuwaw nya Prokopis Pavlopoulos sa kawas 1996, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. qnxan nya Vlassia Peltsemi ga, kneril ni Prokopis Pavlopoulos. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == prokopis~…ē pa*lopoulos~…ē == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, prokopis~…ē pa*lopoulos~…ē, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw …£ree ¶~ ®e ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a prokopis~…ē pa*lopoulos~…ē, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. mintzjuwaw nja prokopis~…ē pa*lopoulos~…ē s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, t ĒariŇč mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~…ēezi. qnxan nja *las~…ēs~…ēia pelts~…ēemi …£a, kneril ni prokopis~…ē pa*lopoulos~…ē. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
